title: Aureline learning/presentation evidence packet, tour-citation audit, and cached-pack continuity contract
description: Boundary schema for one learning_presentation_evidence_packet_record frozen in docs/learning/learning_presentation_evidence_packet.md. The packet is the auditable evidence family that the milestone scorecard, the release-evidence shiproom packet, the accessibility-audit report, the docs-pack review report, the support-handoff bundle, and the public-proof index quote so learning and presentation claims (guided-tour citation lineage, cached-pack continuity, presentation-role boundaries, layout-restore proof, accessibility/keyboard/reduced-motion coverage, classroom-artifact retention, and export-redaction posture) can be reviewed as one record instead of as screenshot collections or ad-hoc demos. Every packet pins the typed window kind (milestone close, release train, weekly governance review, ad-hoc review, support handoff, accessibility audit, docs-pack review), the typed audience and redaction profile so the same packet body can serve engineering, support, enterprise audit, release readiness, accessibility audit, and public-proof review without overexposing speaker notes / audience identity / imported pack bodies, the typed surface-coverage matrix (which guided_surface_kind values the packet exercises plus per-surface fixture refs), the typed tour-citation audit (every waypoint walked back to its canonical command_id / docs_citation_anchor / symbol_linked_reference / keymap_bridge plus the observed drift state), the typed cached-pack continuity (per docs / glossary / command-tip / imported-teaching pack ref the observed continuity state and freshness class), the typed presentation-role review (presenter / co-presenter / observer / audience role bindings, share state, follow mode, presenter-bar visibility, speaker-note locality, audience visibility, breakaway recovery), the typed layout-restore proof (every layout anchor lands on a canonical workspace surface), the typed accessibility/keyboard coverage (reduced motion, keyboard reachability, screen reader, high contrast), the typed classroom-artifact retention aggregate, the typed export-redaction posture (no raw speaker notes, no audience identity leak, imported pack verification preserved, cached-pack continuity preserved, replay retention preserved), the typed linked artifact families (learnability contract, learning-and-presentation contract, guided surface state schema, guided tour schema, learning progress schema, presentation mode state schema, command descriptor contract, citation anchor object model, follow-and-presenter state schema, control grant schema, transient surface schema, keybinding resolver schema), the typed change-significance summary (informational, release-bearing, claim-narrowing, claim-widening-blocked) with schema-enforced pairings, the typed consuming-surface parity floor, the typed policy_context, the typed running_build_identity_ref, and the typed evaluated/minted/frozen/superseded/withdrawn timestamps. Raw speaker-note bodies, raw audience chat or Q&A bodies, raw audience identity, raw glossary or docs pack bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw imported teaching pack payloads, and raw secrets MUST NOT appear; the record carries opaque refs, typed vocabulary, and bounded reviewable summaries only. This schema does not redeclare per-record vocabulary already frozen in schemas/ux/guided_surface_state.schema.json (guided_surface_kind, guidance_authority_class, dismissal_class, freshness_class, suppression_cause_class, learning_mode_profile_class), schemas/ux/guided_tour.schema.json (tour_audience_class, indexing_readiness_class, waypoint_anchor_kind, layout_target_class, partial_indexing_disclosure_class, source_language_fallback_class), schemas/ux/learning_progress.schema.json (completion_class, dismissal_origin_class, dont_show_again_scope_class, progress_reset_origin_class), or schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json (share_state_class, replay_retention_class, reduced_motion_posture_class, accessibility_keyboard_class, presenter_bar_visibility_class, audience_visibility_class, speaker_note_locality_class, local_remote_shared_boundary_class, breakaway_recovery_class, layout_anchor_kind) — it cites those vocabularies by name and re-exports the closed enum surface where a typed pivot is needed. Adding a new audience class, redaction-profile class, window-kind class, surface-coverage class, tour-citation-drift class, cached-pack-continuity class, presentation-role-review class, layout-restore-proof class, accessibility/keyboard coverage class, classroom-artifact retention class, export-redaction-posture class, linked-artifact-family class, change-significance class, parity-floor surface class, audit event id, or denial reason is additive-minor and bumps learning_presentation_packet_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

learning_presentation_packet_schema_vers.description: Integer schema version for the learning/presentation evidence packet payload shape. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable identifier safe for live surfaces, support bundles, public-proof packets, claim manifests, release packets, governance packets, and screenshots. Raw speaker-note bodies, raw audience chat or Q&A bodies, raw audience identity, raw glossary or docs pack bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw imported teaching pack payloads, and raw secrets MUST NOT appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Bounded reviewable display label. Carries presentation-only summary copy; never carries raw speaker-note bodies, raw audience chat or Q&A bodies, raw audience identity, raw glossary or docs pack bodies, or raw URLs.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewable sentence. Raw speaker-note bodies, raw audience chat or Q&A bodies, raw audience identity, raw glossary or docs pack bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw imported teaching pack payloads, and raw secrets MUST NOT appear.

window_kind_class.description: Closed seven-class window-kind vocabulary. A packet whose window cannot be typed denies with window_kind_class_unresolved rather than collapsing to ad_hoc_review_window.

audience_class.description: Closed six-class audience vocabulary. A packet whose audience cannot be typed denies with audience_class_unresolved rather than collapsing to engineering_internal.

redaction_profile_class.description: Closed six-class redaction-profile vocabulary. The schema enforces redaction_profile_class matches audience_class per the contract's audience-redaction pairing table.

freshness_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/guided_surface_state.schema.json. Names the freshness state of the docs / glossary / command-tip / imported-teaching pack the entry resolves against. Used by the cached-pack continuity entries.

policy_context.description: Policy context the packet was minted under. Re-validated on every reopen / re-audit; a stale policy epoch denies with policy_epoch_expired.

guided_surface_kind.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/guided_surface_state.schema.json. Used inside surface-coverage entries when the audit cites individual guided_surface_state_record rows.

waypoint_anchor_kind.description: Re-exported from schemas/ux/guided_tour.schema.json (with keymap_bridge_anchor added so the audit can record bridge resolutions). Used inside tour-citation audit entries.

layout_target_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/guided_tour.schema.json. Used inside layout-restore proof entries to confirm the audited layout anchor landed on a canonical workspace surface.

share_state_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json. Used inside presentation-role review entries.

replay_retention_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json. Used inside classroom-artifact retention entries to preserve the upstream retention class without redeclaring it.

breakaway_recovery_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json. Used inside presentation-role review entries.

local_remote_shared_boundary_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json. Used inside layout-restore proof entries to record the boundary the audited layout anchor honoured.

surface_coverage_kind_class.description: Closed thirteen-class surface-coverage vocabulary. Names which guided-surface families the packet exercises. A packet that covers no surface denies with surface_coverage_empty.

tour_citation_drift_class.description: Closed seven-class tour-citation drift vocabulary. Names what the audit observed when it walked a waypoint citation back to its canonical anchor.

cached_pack_kind_class.description: Closed four-class pack-kind vocabulary used by cached-pack continuity entries.

cached_pack_continuity_state_class.description: Closed eight-class cached-pack continuity vocabulary. Names the per-pack continuity state at the audit window so the learning experience stays honest about source freshness and availability.

presentation_role_review_state_class.description: Closed ten-class presentation-role review vocabulary. Names what the audit confirmed about presenter / co-presenter / observer / audience role bindings, share state, follow target, presenter bar, and speaker notes.

layout_restore_proof_class.description: Closed eight-class layout-restore proof vocabulary. Names what the audit confirmed about the audited presentation layout anchors.

accessibility_keyboard_coverage_class.description: Closed six-class accessibility/keyboard coverage vocabulary. Names what the audit confirmed about reduced-motion, keyboard reachability, screen-reader announcements, and high-contrast focus across the audited surfaces and sessions.

classroom_artifact_retention_class.description: Closed five-class classroom-artifact retention vocabulary. Names what the audit observed about audience-visible artifact retention on classroom or facilitator-led sessions, paired with replay_retention_class re-projected from schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json.

export_redaction_posture_class.description: Closed fourteen-class export-redaction posture vocabulary. Names the redaction guarantees the packet asserts for learning / presentation export pipelines. Every packet MUST carry at minimum no_raw_speaker_notes_cross_boundary plus audience_identity_never_leaked plus imported_pack_verification_state_preserved plus cached_pack_continuity_state_preserved plus replay_retention_class_preserved; missing any denies with export_redaction_posture_minimum_floor_unmet.

linked_artifact_family_class.description: Closed fourteen-class linked-artifact-family vocabulary. Every packet MUST cite at minimum learnability_contract plus learning_and_presentation_contract plus guided_surface_state_schema plus command_descriptor_contract plus citation_anchor_object_model; missing any denies with linked_artifact_family_minimum_floor_unmet.

change_significance_class.description: Closed four-class change-significance vocabulary mirroring the governance packet contract. claim_narrowing packets MUST cite claim_manifest_row_id_refs; claim_widening_blocked packets MUST cite at least one blocking caveat drawn from tour_citation_drift_class, cached_pack_continuity_state_class, or classroom_artifact_retention_class.

consuming_surface_parity_floor_class.description: Closed nine-class consuming-surface parity-floor vocabulary. Names which downstream surfaces the packet asserts parity for. A surface that diverges from the parity floor is non-conforming and denies with consuming_surface_parity_floor_unmet.

learning_presentation_packet_denial_reas.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the learning/presentation evidence packet stream. Denials fail closed; silent collapse to a permissive default is forbidden.

learning_presentation_packet_audit_event.description: Frozen audit-event id vocabulary on the learning/presentation evidence packet stream.

schema_id.description: Stable schema id (e.g. 'schemas/ux/guided_tour.schema.json' or 'schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json'). The packet pins the integer version it audited against so reviewers can detect schema-version drift between the packet and its sources.

pinned_version.description: Pinned integer schema version the packet audited.

exercised_guided_surface_kinds.description: Optional pivot back to the guided_surface_kind values the surface coverage entry exercised.

exercised_accessibility_keyboard_classes.description: Optional per-entry accessibility/keyboard coverage classes; the packet-wide aggregate lives on accessibility_keyboard_coverage.

evidence_fixture_refs.description: Opaque refs to the worked-example fixture rows that back the surface coverage claim. Empty refs deny with surface_coverage_empty.

surface_coverage_entry.description: One surface-coverage entry. Names the guided-surface family the packet exercised plus the freshness classes that surface ran under.

tour_citation_audit_entry.description: One tour-citation audit entry. Pairs the drift class to the cited waypoint / architecture-map node / command tip and the canonical ref the audit walked back to.

suppressed_surface_count.description: Number of guided surfaces that suppressed because the pack is not installed, unverified, or revoked. Counted without leaking the surface bodies.

cached_pack_continuity_entry.description: One cached-pack continuity entry. Names the docs / glossary / command-tip / imported-teaching pack and the observed continuity state plus the freshness class.

presentation_role_review_entry.description: One presentation-role review entry. Pairs the role-review state class to the cited session / role binding / follow target / presenter handoff / breakaway / control grant row.

layout_restore_proof_entry.description: One layout-restore proof entry. Pairs the proof class to the cited presentation_layout_anchor row, the observed layout target class, and the observed local/remote/shared boundary class.

accessibility_keyboard_coverage_entry.description: One accessibility/keyboard coverage entry. Pairs the coverage class to the cited session or guided surface state row.

retained_artifact_count.description: Count of audience-visible artifacts retained under the cited retention class. Counted without leaking artifact bodies or audience identity.

classroom_artifact_retention_entry.description: One classroom-artifact retention entry. Pairs the retention class to the cited session and the observed replay_retention_class.

redaction_posture_classes.description: Posture classes the packet asserts. minItems 5 because the export-redaction-posture floor (no_raw_speaker_notes_cross_boundary, audience_identity_never_leaked, imported_pack_verification_state_preserved, cached_pack_continuity_state_preserved, replay_retention_class_preserved) is enforced via the contains-floor allOf gates on the parent record.

export_redaction_posture.description: Typed export redaction posture. Names the redaction guarantees the packet asserts so learning / presentation export pipelines remain explicit about speaker-note locality, audience identity, pack verification, cached-pack continuity, and replay retention.

family_classes.description: Linked artifact-family classes. minItems 5 because the linked-artifact-family floor (learnability_contract, learning_and_presentation_contract, guided_surface_state_schema, command_descriptor_contract, citation_anchor_object_model) is enforced via contains-floor allOf gates on the parent record.

linked_artifact_families_block.description: Typed linked-artifact-families block. Names the artifact families this packet composes with by class plus optional opaque refs into each family for the support / audit reviewer to follow.

claim_manifest_row_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to claim_manifest rows the packet narrows. Required (non-empty) when overall_significance_class = claim_narrowing.

blocking_caveat_classes.description: Caveat classes that block claim widening. Required (non-empty) when overall_significance_class = claim_widening_blocked.

change_significance_summary.description: Change-significance summary. Mirrors the governance and search-truth packet contracts so a learning/presentation evidence packet can declare informational, release-bearing, claim-narrowing, or claim-widening-blocked posture under the same vocabulary.

schema_version_pins.description: Pinned integer schema versions the packet audited. minItems 4 because the packet MUST pin schemas/ux/guided_surface_state.schema.json, schemas/ux/guided_tour.schema.json, schemas/ux/learning_progress.schema.json, and schemas/ux/presentation_mode_state.schema.json. The contains-floor allOf gates below enforce the four floor schemas.

surface_coverage.description: Surface-coverage matrix. minItems 1 because a packet that covers no surface denies with surface_coverage_empty.

tour_citation_audit.description: Tour-citation audit entries. MAY be empty when the packet does not cover guided-tour, architecture-map, command-tip-pack, or glossary-card surfaces; the schema gates below force a non-empty list when any of those surface-coverage classes is present.

cached_pack_continuity.description: Cached-pack continuity entries. minItems 1 because every packet declares the cached-pack continuity state for at least one audited pack ref; an empty list denies with cached_pack_continuity_empty.

presentation_role_review.description: Presentation-role review entries. MAY be empty when the packet does not cover a presentation session; the schema gates below force a non-empty list when covers_presentation_session_surface is present.

layout_restore_proof.description: Layout-restore proof entries. MAY be empty when the packet does not cover a presentation session; the schema gates below force a non-empty list when covers_presentation_session_surface is present.

accessibility_keyboard_coverage.description: Accessibility/keyboard coverage entries. minItems 1 because every packet declares at least one accessibility/keyboard coverage class; an empty list denies with accessibility_keyboard_coverage_empty.

classroom_artifact_retention.description: Classroom-artifact retention entries. MAY be empty when the packet does not cover a classroom-managed-pool or facilitator-led session.

consuming_surface_parity_floor.description: Consuming-surface parity floor. Names which downstream surfaces the packet asserts parity for.

running_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque pin to the running build identity the packet was minted under (D-0011).

allOf.description: audience-redaction pairing: engineering_internal pairs with engineering_internal_only.
audience-redaction pairing: support_handoff pairs with support_handoff_redacted.
audience-redaction pairing: enterprise_audit pairs with enterprise_audit_redacted.
audience-redaction pairing: release_readiness pairs with release_readiness_summary.
audience-redaction pairing: accessibility_audit pairs with accessibility_audit_redacted.
audience-redaction pairing: public_proof_safe pairs with public_proof_safe_zero_payload.
schema-version pin floor: guided_surface_state.schema.json MUST be pinned.
schema-version pin floor: guided_tour.schema.json MUST be pinned.
schema-version pin floor: learning_progress.schema.json MUST be pinned.
schema-version pin floor: presentation_mode_state.schema.json MUST be pinned.
export-redaction-posture floor: no_raw_speaker_notes_cross_boundary MUST be present.
export-redaction-posture floor: audience_identity_never_leaked MUST be present.
export-redaction-posture floor: imported_pack_verification_state_preserved MUST be present.
export-redaction-posture floor: cached_pack_continuity_state_preserved MUST be present.
export-redaction-posture floor: replay_retention_class_preserved MUST be present.
linked-artifact-family floor: learnability_contract MUST be present.
linked-artifact-family floor: learning_and_presentation_contract MUST be present.
linked-artifact-family floor: guided_surface_state_schema MUST be present.
linked-artifact-family floor: command_descriptor_contract MUST be present.
linked-artifact-family floor: citation_anchor_object_model MUST be present.
claim_narrowing significance MUST cite at least one claim_manifest_row.
claim_widening_blocked significance MUST cite at least one blocking caveat.
presentation session coverage forces non-empty presentation-role review and layout-restore proof.
guided-tour-step coverage forces non-empty tour-citation audit.
architecture-map coverage forces non-empty tour-citation audit.
command-tip-pack coverage forces non-empty tour-citation audit.
glossary-card coverage forces non-empty tour-citation audit.
Frozen, superseded, and withdrawn packets MUST set frozen_at.

learning_presentation_evidence_packet_re.description: One learning/presentation evidence packet record. The auditable evidence family that pins surface coverage, tour-citation audit, cached-pack continuity, presentation-role review, layout-restore proof, accessibility/keyboard coverage, classroom-artifact retention, export-redaction posture, linked artifact families, and change-significance posture for one window. Carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, and bounded reviewable summaries only; raw speaker-note bodies, raw audience chat or Q&A bodies, raw audience identity, raw glossary or docs pack bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw imported teaching pack payloads, and raw secrets MUST NOT appear.

subject_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the learning_presentation_evidence_packet_record the event names.

allOf.description: Denial events MUST carry a denial reason.

learning_presentation_packet_audit_event.description: Audit event emitted on the learning/presentation evidence packet stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw speaker-note bodies, raw audience chat or Q&A bodies, raw audience identity, raw glossary or docs pack bodies, raw URLs, or raw absolute paths.
